description: Study of communication networks with focus on performance analysis. Layered network structure. Basic protocol functions such as addressing, multiplexing, routing, forwarding, flow control, error control, and congestion response.  Overview of transport, network, and link layer protocol standards.  Introduction to wireless and mobile networks.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: E C E 203and (COMP SCI 400or 367 prior to Fall 2018), graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
